series_metadata.series_description: This series contains working papers dealing with negotiations; correspondence dealing with certificates of participation to and from using agencies and to and form Society Bank & Bank One (who are the trustees and are responsible for disbursement of funds). In order to buy equipment (computer & microwave) certificates are sold to raise money. Computer Services then pays the bank who in turn pays the certificate holders.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five (5) years closeout of payment
